name: Eggert
desc: A Discord bot for the TypeGG typing community that displays detailed account statistics and personal bests directly in Discord.

name: TypeRacer Stats
desc: A typing stats Discord bot for TypeRacer - similar to Eggert but tailored to the TypeRacer platform and its community.

name: Art Generator
desc: A browser-based generative art tool with real-time parameter tuning, a randomize function, and a persistent local gallery.

name: Clipboard History
desc: A lightweight Windows clipboard manager with searchable history, system tray integration, a Quick Pick popup, and an inline calculator.

name: Rubik Tac Toe
desc: A real-time two-player game with two modes: Classic 3x3 grid, and a 3D twist that plays across the six faces of a Rubik's Cube.

name: Thonk
desc: A randomized thinking emoji generator available as a pip library, with a JavaScript playground for browser-based use.

name: Loop Lab
desc: A browser-based step sequencer for composing and saving music loops, with 16 steps, 13 melodic notes, 3 drum sounds, and real-time Web Audio API playback.

name: Wordle Bot
desc: An automatic Wordle solver that plays through the daily puzzle using constraint filtering and information-maximizing guess selection, winning ~90% of games.

name: Last.FM Radio
desc: A web app that builds a playlist from your Last.FM listening history and plays it through YouTube, with scrobbling support and configurable play count filters.
